note: Sample dataset for development. Organisations are fictitious; a curated real-world feed is on the roadmap.

opportunities.title: Software Development Graduate Programme
opportunities.description: 12-month rotational programme across mobile, web and cloud teams. Mentorship, real production work, permanent placement on completion.

opportunities.title: Junior Flutter Developer
opportunities.description: Build and maintain consumer mobile apps with a small product team. 0-2 years experience; a portfolio beats a degree.

opportunities.title: IT Support Learnership (NQF 5)
opportunities.description: 12-month accredited learnership combining classroom training with workplace experience. Monthly stipend included.

opportunities.title: Data Analytics Internship
opportunities.description: 6-month internship working with real client datasets. SQL and spreadsheet skills required; Python a plus.

opportunities.title: Junior Network Technician
opportunities.description: Install and support fibre and wireless networks across the province. Driver's licence required, training provided.

opportunities.title: Finance Graduate Programme
opportunities.description: 24-month CA training contract pathway with rotations through audit, tax and advisory.

opportunities.title: Digital Marketing Internship
opportunities.description: Hands-on 6-month internship: social campaigns, content and analytics for local brands.

opportunities.title: Electrical Engineering Learnership
opportunities.description: 18-month learnership at generation facilities. N3 or higher in electrical engineering required.

opportunities.title: Junior QA Tester
opportunities.description: Remote-first QA role: manual and automated testing of mobile releases. Curiosity and attention to detail over experience.

opportunities.title: Retail Management Graduate Programme
opportunities.description: Fast-track store leadership programme with rotations across operations, buying and logistics.

opportunities.title: Cloud Engineering Internship
opportunities.description: 6-month internship on the cloud platform team: GCP, CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code.

opportunities.title: Junior Graphic Designer
opportunities.description: Entry-level design role: brand assets, social content and print. Portfolio required.
